title: Enchantments to Books
description: Transfer enchantments from tools to books with a fully customizable datapack
body:
Enchantments to Books allows the transfer of all enchantments from an item to a book with fully customizable behavior to personalize the pack according to your needs and playstyle.


## Usage
 Dropping a Vessel Book and an enchanted item on top of an anvil will trigger a ritual that consumes some experience levels and transfers all enchantments to the book.


 Vessel Books can be crafted by surrounding a book with 8 pieces of lapis lazuli.
 
![Vessel Book crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c82862f0b1d2110cf57c819526b2c37724a69c56.png)


 When trying to transfer enchantments from a cursed item, bad things might happen.

## Config
 Every aspect of this datapack can be toggled and customized with the following command:
- **/function transfer_enchant:settings**

## Credits
This project is based on [Enchantments to Books](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/enchantments-to-books-amp-repaircost-fix/) by FieryHammer which has not been updated for 5 years so I decided to try updating the pack to modern versions.

Also, thank you to u/GalSergey on the Minecraft commands subreddit for all the help with this!
